chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 30 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case/priority 1.For orders on office objection 2.For orders on CMA 2595/2023 3.For hearing of CMA 55/2021 4.For hearing of main case. 10-08-2023 Mr. Zaffar Ali Shah, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Habib Khan, Advocate for respondents No.2 to 5. Mr. Dareshani Ali Haider ‘Ada’, D.A.G for Pakistan. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, the same stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
